metadata.normalization_policy: Sequential idea_id values are assigned by the script after generation to protect downstream M3 mapping.

ideas.title: Narrative Weaver
ideas.target_user: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy story-driven experiences but have limited time for long play sessions.
ideas.problem_or_desire: Desire for engaging, evolving narratives that can be experienced in short, meaningful bursts.
ideas.core_concept: A mobile game where player choices in short, branching narrative segments dynamically alter future story paths and character relationships, creating a unique personal story for each player.
ideas.proposed_approach: Develop a system for procedurally generating narrative branches based on player decisions, focusing on emotional impact and replayability. Utilize a simple, tap-based interaction model.
ideas.prototype_scope: A single, self-contained story arc with 5-10 key decision points, demonstrating how choices affect immediate outcomes and setting up future narrative possibilities.
ideas.one_sentence_pitch: A mobile game where player choices in short, branching narrative segments dynamically alter future story paths and character relationships, creating a unique personal story for each player.
ideas.hidden_pain_or_desire: Desire for engaging, evolving narratives that can be experienced in short, meaningful bursts.
ideas.creative_leap: A mobile game where player choices in short, branching narrative segments dynamically alter future story paths and character relationships, creating a unique personal story for each player.
ideas.proposed_solution: Develop a system for procedurally generating narrative branches based on player decisions, focusing on emotional impact and replayability. Utilize a simple, tap-based interaction model.
ideas.core_experience: A mobile game where player choices in short, branching narrative segments dynamically alter future story paths and character relationships, creating a unique personal story for each player.
ideas.mvp_seed: A single, self-contained story arc with 5-10 key decision points, demonstrating how choices affect immediate outcomes and setting up future narrative possibilities.
ideas.first_7_day_prototype: A single, self-contained story arc with 5-10 key decision points, demonstrating how choices affect immediate outcomes and setting up future narrative possibilities.

ideas.title: Rhythm Sculptor
ideas.target_user: Music enthusiasts and rhythm game players seeking creative expression beyond traditional note-matching.
ideas.problem_or_desire: Desire to create and manipulate music within a game context, not just react to it.
ideas.core_concept: A rhythm game where players don't just hit notes, but actively 'sculpt' the music by altering tempo, adding/removing instruments, and applying effects in real-time to achieve a target sonic profile.
ideas.proposed_approach: Implement a dynamic audio engine that allows for real-time manipulation of pre-composed musical tracks. Focus on intuitive gesture controls for sculpting.
ideas.prototype_scope: A single song with a basic 'sculpting' mode where players can adjust tempo and toggle instrument layers, with a scoring system based on adherence to a target sonic description.
ideas.one_sentence_pitch: A rhythm game where players don't just hit notes, but actively 'sculpt' the music by altering tempo, adding/removing instruments, and applying effects in real-time to achieve a target sonic profile.
ideas.hidden_pain_or_desire: Desire to create and manipulate music within a game context, not just react to it.
ideas.creative_leap: A rhythm game where players don't just hit notes, but actively 'sculpt' the music by altering tempo, adding/removing instruments, and applying effects in real-time to achieve a target sonic profile.
ideas.proposed_solution: Implement a dynamic audio engine that allows for real-time manipulation of pre-composed musical tracks. Focus on intuitive gesture controls for sculpting.
ideas.core_experience: A rhythm game where players don't just hit notes, but actively 'sculpt' the music by altering tempo, adding/removing instruments, and applying effects in real-time to achieve a target sonic profile.
ideas.mvp_seed: A single song with a basic 'sculpting' mode where players can adjust tempo and toggle instrument layers, with a scoring system based on adherence to a target sonic description.
ideas.first_7_day_prototype: A single song with a basic 'sculpting' mode where players can adjust tempo and toggle instrument layers, with a scoring system based on adherence to a target sonic description.

ideas.title: Geo-Quest Companion
ideas.target_user: Outdoor enthusiasts and explorers who enjoy augmented reality (AR) and location-based games.
ideas.problem_or_desire: Desire for AR games that seamlessly integrate with real-world exploration and encourage discovery of local points of interest.
ideas.core_concept: An AR mobile game that overlays a persistent, player-influenced fantasy world onto the real world, with quests and challenges tied to actual geographic locations and landmarks.
ideas.proposed_approach: Leverage device GPS and AR capabilities to anchor game elements to real-world coordinates. Focus on collaborative gameplay where players can contribute to the persistent world.
ideas.prototype_scope: A small, localized area (e.g., a park or neighborhood) with a few AR 'nodes' that trigger simple collection or puzzle mini-games, demonstrating location-based interaction and persistent world elements.
ideas.one_sentence_pitch: An AR mobile game that overlays a persistent, player-influenced fantasy world onto the real world, with quests and challenges tied to actual geographic locations and landmarks.
ideas.hidden_pain_or_desire: Desire for AR games that seamlessly integrate with real-world exploration and encourage discovery of local points of interest.
ideas.creative_leap: An AR mobile game that overlays a persistent, player-influenced fantasy world onto the real world, with quests and challenges tied to actual geographic locations and landmarks.
ideas.proposed_solution: Leverage device GPS and AR capabilities to anchor game elements to real-world coordinates. Focus on collaborative gameplay where players can contribute to the persistent world.
ideas.core_experience: An AR mobile game that overlays a persistent, player-influenced fantasy world onto the real world, with quests and challenges tied to actual geographic locations and landmarks.
ideas.mvp_seed: A small, localized area (e.g., a park or neighborhood) with a few AR 'nodes' that trigger simple collection or puzzle mini-games, demonstrating location-based interaction and persistent world elements.
ideas.first_7_day_prototype: A small, localized area (e.g., a park or neighborhood) with a few AR 'nodes' that trigger simple collection or puzzle mini-games, demonstrating location-based interaction and persistent world elements.

ideas.title: Abstract Strategy Duel
ideas.target_user: Players who enjoy deep, strategic board games and competitive mobile gaming.
ideas.problem_or_desire: Desire for a highly strategic, turn-based mobile game with simple mechanics but profound depth, suitable for quick matches.
ideas.core_concept: A minimalist, abstract strategy game where players place and move pieces on a grid, with each piece having a unique, context-dependent interaction rule that changes based on adjacent pieces.
ideas.proposed_approach: Design a set of interlocking, emergent rules for a small set of abstract pieces. Focus on a clean UI and fast-paced AI for single-player testing.
ideas.prototype_scope: A single game mode with two distinct piece types and a 5x5 grid, demonstrating the core interaction loop and win condition.
ideas.one_sentence_pitch: A minimalist, abstract strategy game where players place and move pieces on a grid, with each piece having a unique, context-dependent interaction rule that changes based on adjacent pieces.
ideas.hidden_pain_or_desire: Desire for a highly strategic, turn-based mobile game with simple mechanics but profound depth, suitable for quick matches.
ideas.creative_leap: A minimalist, abstract strategy game where players place and move pieces on a grid, with each piece having a unique, context-dependent interaction rule that changes based on adjacent pieces.
ideas.proposed_solution: Design a set of interlocking, emergent rules for a small set of abstract pieces. Focus on a clean UI and fast-paced AI for single-player testing.
ideas.core_experience: A minimalist, abstract strategy game where players place and move pieces on a grid, with each piece having a unique, context-dependent interaction rule that changes based on adjacent pieces.
ideas.mvp_seed: A single game mode with two distinct piece types and a 5x5 grid, demonstrating the core interaction loop and win condition.
ideas.first_7_day_prototype: A single game mode with two distinct piece types and a 5x5 grid, demonstrating the core interaction loop and win condition.

ideas.title: Ephemeral Art Canvas
ideas.target_user: Creative individuals and casual gamers looking for a relaxing, non-competitive digital art experience.
ideas.problem_or_desire: Desire for a mobile art tool that encourages spontaneous creation and embraces the beauty of temporary, evolving digital art.
ideas.core_concept: A mobile game where players paint with 'living' brushes that have unique behaviors (e.g., spreading, fading, reacting to other strokes) on a canvas that slowly degrades or transforms over time.
ideas.proposed_approach: Develop a physics-based or agent-based simulation for brush behaviors. Focus on a tactile, intuitive drawing interface and a visually appealing, evolving aesthetic.
ideas.prototype_scope: A single canvas with 2-3 distinct 'living' brush types and a time-based decay mechanic, allowing users to create and observe a piece evolve for a limited duration.
ideas.one_sentence_pitch: A mobile game where players paint with 'living' brushes that have unique behaviors (e.g., spreading, fading, reacting to other strokes) on a canvas that slowly degrades or transforms over time.
